subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy servants who have turned toward the sanctuary of Thy nearness and Thy presence, after Thou didst call unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری عبادک اقبلوا الی شطر قربک و لقائک بعد الذی نادیتهم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God
